title: Integration with self-managed Gitlab
excerpt: I was wondering if someone implemented an integration between Monday and self-hosted/manager Gitlab or has some opinion on how to approach this…

posts.author: tylera (Tyler)
posts.cookedHtml: I was wondering if someone implemented an integration between Monday and self-hosted/manager Gitlab or has some opinion on how to approach this…

posts.author: bernhard (Bernhard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our company would also be interested in this.

Unfortunately, Monday explicitly states on their help-webseite, that only the gitlab hosted at “gitlab.com” is supported. Supporting other self-hosted publicly reachable instances should be no more difficult than have a field where that instance URL can be entered, rather than having gitlab.comas default.

Monday seems to be unwilling to invest these 2s of work to provide this feature for business customers with self-hosted enterprise gitlab instances. Was very disappointed when we found that out.

posts.author: baswienhoven (Bas Wienhoven)
posts.cookedHtml:
@tylera @bernhard
I’m very excited to inform you that we, Avisi Apps, just released a new version of our GitLab integration where we also added support for GitLab Self-Managed.
Check it out on the monday.com marketplace. If you have any questions or feature ideas, please share them with us!

posts.author: CaptainWeb (Tristan Valente)
posts.cookedHtml:
A much needed feature to your app @baswienhoven is to be able to create items automatically when a new issue/merge request is created on a project.

Do you think it is achievable already through some sort of API voodoo ?
